name: My Hevy Collection
summary: My personal workout programs in Hevy — programmed for how I train, track, and recover. These are not a legend's reference split; they are my own days with my set schemes, notes, and exercise picks.

hevyFolders.name: Bulk like Dorian
hevyFolders.note: Main bulk block — back, chest, legs, shoulders, and cardio days.

trainingNotes: Most lifts use two progressive warm-ups (W1/W2) then all-out failure sets (F1/F2).
Leg day has quad- and ham-priority variants — pick one per rotation.
Supersets are marked SS A/B in the exercise table.
Open a folder below to run these workouts in the Hevy app.
